news.t: Pacer ETFs Surpasses $25B Milestone in Assets Under Management
This 6.7%-Yielding Dividend ETF Is Outperforming With Its Unique Emerging Markets Strategy
Pacer ETFs Celebrates Banner Year of Growth in 2022, Crosses $20B to Kickoff New Year

holdings.infoBox: ECOW is an equity ETF with a total of 111 individual holdings. The top holdings are United Microelectronics stock at 3.50%, Weichai Power at 3.17%, Petróleo Brasileiro S.A. - Petrobras at 2.55%, Ambev at 2.37%, and America Movil SAB de CV Ordinary Shares - Class B at 2.30%.

overview.description: The Pacer Emerging Markets Cash Cows 100 ETF (ECOW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a fundamentally-weighted index of large- and mid-cap emerging market companies. ECOW was launched on May 2, 2019 and is issued by Pacer.
